title: Bloomsbury Mill - Cellular Blankets Baby - Soft 100% Organic Cotton Baby Blanket - Pack of 2 - Essentials For Newborn - Ideal for Cot Bed, Travel, Car Seat, Pram, Moses Basket - Pink 75x95cm
features: COSY BABY BLANKET FOR NEWBORN: Whether they’re out and about in a pushchair or sleeping peacefully in their cot, a breathable cellular blanket is a great way to keep baby cosy and snug and a newborn essential for any baby accessories range. Designed with a clever ‘cell’ construction, it traps the air to keep baby cool in summer and warm in winter.

ORGANIC BABY PRAM BLANKETS: All of our cotton cellular blankets are crafted from beautifully soft 100% GOTS certified organic cotton. We only use GOTS as it ensures that the blankets are all natural, sustainably grown and environmentally responsible. They are also designed with practicality in mind as they’re easy to wash, quick drying, can be tumble dried on a low heat and most importantly are kind to sensitive skin of a new born.

BABY NURSERY ACCESSORIES SPECIALISTS: Bloomsbury Mill are award winning manufacturers of nursery items that help to create more moments of everyday fun. We design fit for life products for young families which do not compromise on inspiration, imagination, quality and design. By selecting Bloomsbury Mill, you can be assured that every product meets the highest safety standards and provides ultimate reassurance.

SAFE NEWBORN ESSENTIALS: Every product we sell has been produced to meet the highest industry and quality standards (Oeko-Tex, SEDEX and ISO) so you can be confident that what you’re buying is safe, ethical and honest.
SIZING: 75 x 95 cm each. There are 2 blankets in each pack. All our newborn blankets are available in soft colours of grey, white, blue, pink, green and cream.
